Trade 250+ markets on a super exchange with zero fees, better-than-CEX liquidity, and institutional-grade privacy, all built on a blazingly fast blockchain.</p><div style="height: 10px;"></div><p>Backed by top-tier investors and incubated by Paradigm, we’re scaling fast and building a team of mission-driven engineers to redefine what’s possible in decentralized finance. You’ll work directly with our CEO and a small, elite team of builders in the trenches every day, pushing the limits of performance and UX.</p><div style="height: 10px;"></div><p>Fair warning: this is not an easy place to work. You’ll work on building scalable pipelines and data models that power critical decision-making across the organization. Do</h2><div style="height: 10px;"></div><ul><div style="height: 10px;"></div><li><strong>Design &amp; Build:</strong> Create and maintain scalable data pipelines, ETL processes, and data warehousing measures, and develop automated monitoring systems.</li><div style="height: 10px;"></div><li><strong>Empower &amp; Enable:</strong> Partner with product, engineering and go-to-market teams to deliver data solutions that drive strategic insights.</li><div style="height: 10px;"></div><li><strong>Rapid Response:</strong> Quickly address time-sensitive data needs and ad-hoc requests from stakeholders, turning around critical analyses and data solutions with urgency while maintaining accuracy.</li><div style="height: 10px;"></div></ul><div style="height: 10px;"></div><h2>What You’ll Bring</h2><div style="height: 10px;"></div><ul><div style="height: 10px;"></div><li><strong>Expertise:</strong> 7+ years of data engineering experience</li><div style="height: 10px;"></div><li><strong>Data Architecture:</strong> Deep knowledge of data modeling, warehouse design, and ETL best practices.</li><div style="height: 10px;"></div><li><strong>Technical Mastery:</strong> Proficiency with modern data stack (Snowflake, Airflow/DBT) and AWS.</li><div style="height: 10px;"></div><li><strong>Systems Thinking:</strong> Experience with distributed systems, data streaming (Kafka/Kinesis), and class="job-description"><p><strong>Title: eQM ETL/SQL Engineer (Remote)</strong></p><div style="height: 10px;"></div><p>Location US-Remote</p><div style="height: 10px;"></div><p>ID 2026-7650</p><div style="height: 10px;"></div><p>Category Information Technology</p><div style="height: 10px;"></div><p>Position Type Full-Time</p><div style="height: 10px;"></div><p><strong>Job Description:</strong></p><div style="height: 10px;"></div><p>Overview</p><div style="height: 10px;"></div><p>GovCIO is seeking a highly skilled Electronic Quality Measures (eQM) ETL/SQL Engineer (Remote) to support the management and maintenance of the Veterans Affairs IT infrastructure. This role performs front end web application development, source control management, manages backend web service development and migration, and provides database support. This position leads web development architecture, resolves advanced issues, and drives performance enhancements. This is a fully remote position and within the United States.</p><div style="height: 10px;"></div><p>Responsibilities</p><div style="height: 10px;"></div><p>Designs, models, documents, and guides the logical and conceptual relationship of data and database changes for complex applications. Analyzes needs and requirements of existing and proposed systems, and develops technical, structural, and organizational specifications. May create standards and/or do modeling to monitor and enhance capacity and performance.</p><div style="height: 10px;"></div><ul><div style="height: 10px;"></div><li>Maintain and enhance complex web applications with thousands of users across the VA</li><div style="height: 10px;"></div><li>Support the migration of the eQM web application to the Azure cloud</li><div style="height: 10px;"></div><li>Adhere to data quality best practices, ensuring accuracy, consistency, and reliability across all datasets.</li><div style="height: 10px;"></div><li>Oversee daily operations, monitoring processes to optimize performance and troubleshoot issues.</li><div style="height: 10px;"></div><li>Integrate data from multiple sources, creating unified views that enhance decision-making and insights.</li><div style="height: 10px;"></div><li>Facilitate data distribution, optimize accessibility and usability across relevant systems and stakeholders.</li><div style="height: 10px;"></div></ul><div style="height: 10px;"></div><p>Qualifications</p><div style="height: 10px;"></div><p>Required Skills and Experience:</p><div style="height: 10px;"></div><ul><div style="height: 10px;"></div><li>Bachelor's degree in computer science, Information Technology or a related field15 years of relevant experience, or equivalent professional expertise (or commensurate experience)</li><div style="height: 10px;"></div><li>Front end web application development (HTML, JavaScript - including Vue, Angular, etc., CSS - including Bootstrap, Tailwind, etc).</li><div style="height: 10px;"></div><li>Back end web service development (C# / .NET, ORMs, etc.)</li><div style="height: 10px;"></div><li>Source Control Management and CI/CD (git, github actions)</li><div style="height: 10px;"></div><li>Database support (SQL, OLAP/MDX)</li><div style="height: 10px;"></div></ul><div style="height: 10px;"></div><p>Clearance Required: Ability to obtain and maintain a Suitability/Public Trust clearance.</p><div style="height: 10px;"></div><p>Preferred Skills and Experience:</p><div style="height: 10px;"></div><ul><div style="height: 10px;"></div><li>Familiarity with Agile methodologies and project management tools.</li><div style="height: 10px;"></div><li>General web application hosting concepts (IIS, etc.), web security concepts</li><div style="height: 10px;"></div><li>Experience with third party JS libraries and technologies (npm, webpack, jquery, underscore.js, Google Charts, etc.)</li><div style="height: 10px;"></div><li>Certifications in relevant technologies</li><div style="height: 10px;"></div></ul><div style="height: 10px;"></div><p>Company Overview</p><div style="height: 10px;"></div><p>GovCIO is a team of transformers--people who are passionate about transforming government IT. Actual offer will be based on your qualifications.</p><div style="height: 10px;"></div><p>Pay Transparency</p><div style="height: 10px;"></div><p>Red Hat determines compensation based on several factors including but not limited to job location, experience, applicable skills and training, external market value, and internal pay equity. Annual salary is one component of Red Hat's compensation package. This position may also be eligible for bonus, commission, and/or equity. For positions with Remote-US locations, the actual salary range for the position may differ based on location but will be commensurate with job duties and relevant work experience.</p><div style="height: 10px;"></div><p>About Red Hat</p><div style="height: 10px;"></div><p>Red Hat is the world's leading provider of enterprise open source software solutions, using a community-powered approach to deliver high-performing Linux, cloud, container, and Kubernetes technologies. Spread across 40+ countries, our associates work flexibly across work environments, from in-office, to office-flex, to fully remote, depending on the requirements of their role. Red Hatters are encouraged to bring their best ideas, no matter their title or tenure. We're a leader in open source because of our open and inclusive environment. We hire creative, passionate people ready to contribute their ideas, help solve complex problems, and make an impact.</p><div style="height: 10px;"></div><p>Benefits</p><div style="height: 10px;"></div><ul><div style="height: 10px;"></div><li>Comprehensive medical, dental, and vision coverage</li><div style="height: 10px;"></div><li>Flexible Spending Account - healthcare and dependent care</li><div style="height: 10px;"></div><li>Health Savings Account - high deductible medical plan</li><div style="height: 10px;"></div><li>Retirement 401(k) with employer match</li><div style="height: 10px;"></div><li>Paid time off and holidays</li><div style="height: 10px;"></div><li>Paid parental leave plans for all new parents</li><div style="height: 10px;"></div><li>Leave benefits including disability, paid family medical leave, and paid military leave</li><div style="height: 10px;"></div><li>Additional benefits including employee stock purchase plan, family planning reimbursement, tuition reimbursement, transportation expense account, employee assistance program, and more!</li><div style="height: 10px;"></div></ul><div style="height: 10px;"></div><p>Note: These benefits are only applicable to full time, permanent associates at Red Hat located in the United States.</p><div style="height: 10px;"></div><p>Inclusion at Red Hat</p><div style="height: 10px;"></div><p>Red Hat's culture is built on the open source principles of transparency, collaboration, and inclusion, where the best ideas can come from anywhere and anyone. When this is realized, it empowers people from different backgrounds, perspectives, and experiences to come together to share ideas, challenge the status quo, and drive innovation. Our aspiration is that everyone experiences this culture with equal opportunity and access, and that all voices are not only heard but also celebrated. We hope you will join our celebration, and we welcome and encourage applicants from all the beautiful dimensions that compose our global village.</p><div style="height: 10px;"></div><p>Equal Opportunity Policy (EEO)</p><div style="height: 10px;"></div><p>Red Hat is proud to be an equal opportunity workplace and an affirmative action employer. We review applications for employment without regard to their race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, ancestry, citizenship, age, veteran status, genetic information, physical or mental disability, medical condition, marital status, or any other basis prohibited by law.</p><div style="height: 10px;"></div><p>Red Hat does not seek or accept unsolicited resumes or CVs from recruitment agencies. You'll Do</p><div style="height: 10px;"></div><p>We are looking for an inidual to join the Renaissance Integration and Testing team as Principal, Software Engineering: Software Development Test (SDET), to lead the manual and automated integration testing at the program level.</p><div style="height: 10px;"></div><p>Primary Duties and Responsibilities:</p><div style="height: 10px;"></div><p>To 10px;"></div><li><p>Work with the product teams on resolution of any outstanding issues within the release and post-release</p><div style="height: 10px;"></div></li><div style="height: 10px;"></div><li><p>Categorize issues based on severity, clearing documents details of the issues in the tracking system</p><div style="height: 10px;"></div></li><div style="height: 10px;"></div><li><p>Develop and execute functional and non-functional testing plans</p><div style="height: 10px;"></div></li><div style="height: 10px;"></div><li><p>Keep track of open issues and retest closed issues.</p><div style="height: 10px;"></div></li><div style="height: 10px;"></div><li><p>Provide direction to the other team members for testing integrated systems.</p><div style="height: 10px;"></div></li><div style="height: 10px;"></div><li><p>Build new automation capabilities for integration testing, reconciliation testing, and data testing.</p><div style="height: 10px;"></div></li><div style="height: 10px;"></div><li><p>Partner with internal business users and stakeholders to prioritize and develop requirements and testing for implementing new features and functionality including, but not limited to, Risk Platform applications.</p><div style="height: 10px;"></div></li><div style="height: 10px;"></div><li><p>Manage Ovation system releases, identifying impact and enhancement opportunities, and communicating appropriately</p><div style="height: 10px;"></div></li><div style="height: 10px;"></div><li><p>Support regression testing and introduction of required changes as new releases are introduced</p><div style="height: 10px;"></div></li><div style="height: 10px;"></div><li><p>Provide support for the Ovations systems including, but not limited to, ongoing business needs</p><div style="height: 10px;"></div></li><div style="height: 10px;"></div><li><p>Lead day-to-day activities and delivery schedule of implementation partners engaged for various 10px;"></div><li><p>Minimum of five (5) years' experience implementing, enhancing, and supporting integration testing to address business problems and requirements in multiple functional areas</p><div style="height: 10px;"></div></li><div style="height: 10px;"></div><li><p>Minimum of two (2) year of experience in financial services or capital markets</p><div style="height: 10px;"></div></li><div style="height: 10px;"></div></ul><div style="height: 10px;"></div><p>Certificates or Licenses:</p><div style="height: 10px;"></div><ul><div style="height: 10px;"></div><li>None</li><div style="height: 10px;"></div></ul><div style="height: 10px;"></div><p>About Us</p><div style="height: 10px;"></div><p>The Options Clearing Corporation (OCC) is the world's largest equity derivatives clearing organization. Founded in 1973, OCC is dedicated to promoting stability and market integrity by delivering clearing and settlement services for options, futures and securities lending transactions. As a Systemically Important Financial Market Utility (SIFMU), OCC operates under the jurisdiction of the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC), the U.S. Commodity Futures Trading Commission (CFTC), and the Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System. OCC has more than 100 clearing members and provides central counterparty (CCP) clearing and settlement services to 19 exchanges and trading platforms. More information about OCC is available at <a href="http://www.theocc.com" rel="nofollow noreferrer">www.theocc.com</a>.</p><div style="height: 10px;"></div><p>Benefits</p><div style="height: 10px;"></div><p>A highly collaborative and supportive environment developed to encourage work-life balance and employee wellness. Some of these components include:</p><div style="height: 10px;"></div><ul><div style="height: 10px;"></div><li>A hybrid work environment, up to 2 days per week of remote work</li><div style="height: 10px;"></div><li>Tuition Reimbursement to support your continued education</li><div style="height: 10px;"></div><li>Student Loan Repayment Assistance</li><div style="height: 10px;"></div><li>Technology Stipend allowing you to use the device of your choice to connect to our network while working remotely</li><div style="height: 10px;"></div><li>Generous PTO and Parental leave</li><div style="height: 10px;"></div><li>401k Employer Match</li><div style="height: 10px;"></div><li>Competitive health benefits including medical, dental and vision</li><div style="height: 10px;"></div></ul><div style="height: 10px;"></div><p>Compensation</p><div style="height: 10px;"></div><ul><div style="height: 10px;"></div><li>The salary range listed for any given position is exclusive of fringe benefits and potential bonuses. If hired at OCC, your final base salary compensation will be determined by factors such as skills, experience and/or education.</li><div style="height: 10px;"></div><li>In addition, we believe in the importance of pay equity and consider internal equity of our current team members as part of any final offer.</li><div style="height: 10px;"></div><li>We typically do not hire at the maximum of the range in order to allow for future and continued salary growth. We also offer a substantial benefits package as noted on <a href="http://www.theocc.com/careers" rel="nofollow noreferrer">www.theocc.com/careers</a></li><div style="height: 10px;"></div><li>All employees may be eligible for a discretionary bonus. Discretionary bonuses are based on various factors, including, but not limited to, company and inidual performance and are not guaranteed.</li><div style="height: 10px;"></div></ul><div style="height: 10px;"></div><p>Salary Range</p><div style="height: 10px;"></div><p>$158,600.00 - $263,700.00</p><div style="height: 10px;"></div><p>Incentive Range</p><div style="height: 10px;"></div><p>23% to 30%</p><div style="height: 10px;"></div><p>This position is eligible for an annual discretionary incentive compensation award, for which the target range is listed above (see Incentive Range). world\u0026#39;s largest equity derivatives clearing organization. Founded in 1973, OCC is dedicated to promoting stability and market integrity by delivering clearing and settlement services for options, futures and securities lending transactions. As a Systemically Important Financial Market Utility (SIFMU), OCC operates under the jurisdiction of the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC), the U.S. Commodity Futures Trading Commission (CFTC), and the Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System. OCC has more than 100 clearing members and provides central counterparty (CCP) clearing and settlement services to 19 exchanges and trading platforms.
